outcome: Fixed two graph integrity bugs: incremental reindex no longer over-deletes DEFINES edges, and enum nodes now participate in heritage resolution

changes.description: Added remove_edges_from_file_by_types() method for selective edge removal; added 'enum' to get_class_like_nodes() query

Changed affected-file edge cleanup to use remove_edges_from_file_by_types() with only the 6 rebuilt edge types (imports, calls, extends, implements, uses_type, exports), preserving DEFINES and CONTAINS edges
